headlines.headline: Nolvis Devices CFO addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from a CFO addressing concerns is a reactive measure that suggests underlying investor anxiety.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
